TimeEntry.Title: BWLAP-09 has not been patched for past 14 days

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes Agent updated with new Ver 1.2.0.1125 on FS01
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewing the Malwarebytes portal, we verified that the Malwarebytes Agent Version on the following machine FS01. is outdated . update it to the new version  1.2.0.1125

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan pending on BWLAP-09
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the malwarebytes portal and found Malwarebytes scan pending  on BWLAP-09 .Tried to scan from portal, but it was getting failed. So connected to the machine from manage engine and checked f

TimeEntry.Title: VPN is not connecting
TimeEntry.Notes:
Wroked with Sunny on troubleshooting the VPN Issue and it turned out the port was misconfigured and packets being dropped, this issue is resolved.

  • Port is 10443

TimeEntry.Title: Failure Notification for Automate Patch Deployment task-BWH-TASK

TimeEntry.Title: RA and RG Issue - Users are not able to Login
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked with Munish on RA and RG, reported that users are not able to login to remote apps, after troubleshooting and restoring the server from backup, it turned our that there was a certificate issue

TimeEntry.Title: : anybody else having isssue getting into newstar remotely
TimeEntry.Notes: Saule reported that she was not able to connect with NewStar, so I connected to her computer and found that she was not able to open any RDP published app. I checked from the server and found RDP role

User mailed in that she need to add new mailbox.

 so connect to the system and add the new mailbox to the desktop outlook.

Hence closing the ticket.

TimeEntry.Notes: <span class="ui-provider ed bao bap baq bar bas bat bau bav baw bax bay baz bba bbb bbc bbd bbe bbf bbg bbh bbi bbj bbk bbl bbm bbn bbo bbp bbq bbr bbs bbt bbu bbv" dir="ltr">as I checked and verified

TimeEntry.Title: Daily Status Report for Automate Patch Deployment task-BWH-TASK
TimeEntry.Notes: duplicate so can be closed

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes scan required on the following machines:- (BWLAP-01 and BWws003-PC)
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Malwarebytes portal and found that a scan is needed on the following the machines (BWLAP-01 and BWws003-PC). Pushed the command for scanning. Verified that scan completed successfully

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] BWH-HQ-VONE Memory: Physical Memory (SNMP Memory) Down (6 % (Percent Available Memory) is below the error limit of 10 % in Percent Available Memory)
TimeEntry.Notes: According to the alert check, multiple processes were found to be consuming memory. terminated the processes that were unnecessary, and the memory usage returned to normal.  logged into the PR

TimeEntry.Title: BWLAP-10 System does not sync with the Cisco Umbrella
TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the cisco umbrella portal to check that the system was not sync with the portal long time . so connected to the computer and check the cisco umbrella services and restart the same. after t

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop Issues
TimeEntry.Notes: Received mail about Laptop Issues inform tech created ticket and assign to Sourabh chamoli

TimeEntry.Title: Nancy need assistance with her Nextgen
TimeEntry.Notes: Got a call from Nancy need assistance with her Nextgen transfer call to Satish Sharma created ticket and assign

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop Issues
TimeEntry.Notes: Jody had issue Teams and zoom microphone, Connected on computer and fixed it by changes on Microphone, Did test call on teams , Also allow 365 calendar to Zoom. Can close ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Access into newst ar
TimeEntry.Notes: got a mail about Access into newst ar created ticket and assign to sourabh chamoli to work on it

TimeEntry.Title: Access into newst ar

TimeEntry.Title: Nancy need assistance with her Nextgen

TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the MyRmm portal and found High vumnerability patche were failed after Automatically deployment on BWWS017-PC.  So connected to the machines BWWS017-PC downloaded and installed missin

TimeEntry.Title: One Drive file problem and documents

TimeEntry.Title: One Drive file problem and documents
TimeEntry.Notes: received an email from Daisy Tong regarding an email issue. I attempted to locate Daisy's system remotely but it did not appear in the portal. I then sent an email to Daisy to create a remote session

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] BWH-HQ-VONE Memory: Physical Memory (SNMP Memory) Down (10 % (Percent Available Memory) is below the error limit of 10 % in Percent Available Memory)
TimeEntry.Notes: According to this PRTG alert physical memory sensor has down on BWH-HQ-VONE. I took the remote access of this machine and checked the memory utilization. It was high due to unwanted applications were

TimeEntry.Title: Screen connect version 24.1.9.8915 updated on BWH machine:- (BWH-HQ-LT-05)

TimeEntry.Title: BWWS011 removed

TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the MyRmm portal and found High vumnerability patche were failed after Automatically deployment on BWWS016-PC.  So connected to the machines BWWS016-PC downloaded and installed missin

TimeEntry.Title: [ALPHA.MYSNMP.TECHNIJIAN.COM] BWH-HQ-VONE Memory: Physical Memory (SNMP Memory) Down (10 % (Percent Available Memory) is below the error limit of 10 % in Percent Available Memory)
TimeEntry.Notes: This was PRTG alert that physical memory sensor has down. I took the remote access of this machine and checked the memory utilization. It was normal, So I restarted the SNMP service. I logged into PRT
